target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Target is an armored vehicle with visible fire, thick smoke, and structural deformation; major components appear catastrophically damaged and unrepairable.

summary: One military equipment target has been assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence. The scene depicts a single armored vehicle in a ditch, emitting thick smoke and showing catastrophic structural damage with visible fire, consistent with the prior assessment. The functional impact is likely complete loss of operational capability for the target.
